leg: stale-union fix ACCEPTANCE (routing-aware guard + top-up, on top of the zero-decode mask)
host: RunPod COMMUNITY RTX PRO 6000 Max-Q (sm_120), pod zkxpsuwd0d4em3, driver 590 (2nd Max-Q; the 1st, m1yggco0kpcdof, was NETWORK-DEAD -> killed, ~$1; added a PyPI pre-check)
body: Qwen3-30B-A3B seq256, sample_packing, seed 42, 150 steps, eval_steps 50, prediction_loss_only

floor.note: 6th consecutive clean warm floor across 3 pods / 2 SKUs; mean reproduces the decisive leg + mask-fix leg to 4 places

verdict.vs_mask_only: 0.1027 vs 0.1043 — the top-up changed the gap by 0.0016 (< 2x floor = NOISE). The stale-union fix bought essentially nothing.

mechanism_control_DRIFT.reading: the stale-union bug is REAL and the top-up caught+staged every escape with correct content, yet the loss gap is unchanged -> block-0 boundary staleness contributes NEGLIGIBLY to the convergence divergence.

synthesis.conclusion: TWO real bugs found and fixed by direct intervention — (1) un-routed fill CONTENT (zero-decode mask: halved 0.182->0.104), (2) boundary-block STALENESS (top-up: confirmed 147/147 on block 0, but 0.104->0.103 = no effect). NEITHER is the dominant residual. A ~103x-floor coherent residual persists whose source is now known NOT to be fill content or block-0 freshness.
synthesis.what_this_rules_out: the content-sensitivity (legacy 0.182 vs mask 0.104) is NOT caused by block-0 staleness (fixing staleness didn't move it). So some OTHER path is sensitive to the routed-vs-whole difference, and it is not the sparse forward (bit-identical) nor the boundary block.
synthesis.recommendation: STOP the blind-fix + $13-bracket loop (3 brackets, ~$33, 2 real bugs, gap stuck ~100x). The disciplined next step is a CHEAP localizing diagnostic, NOT a third guessed fix: run whole vs routed-mask for a handful of steps on a SMALL MoE (OLMoE) and diff the per-parameter GRADIENTS (and per-layer activations) to pinpoint WHERE the routed-vs-whole training signal first diverges. ~$1, decisive about the mechanism; only then design a targeted fix.
synthesis.fix_disposition: fix/routed-stale-union stays a SIDE BRANCH — it corrects a real staleness bug (a correctness improvement) but has zero convergence benefit and a small top-up cost, and routed TRAINING is still non-viable, so it has no consumer to merge into. Do NOT graduate to feature/expert-store.
